sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Latest WHG News - Westwood Announces Monthly Income Distributi...
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive news feed for Westwood Holdings Group (WHG), an investment management and wealth management firm. It covers various aspects of the company's news including quarterly earnings, assets under management, energy and real assets activities, ETF announcements, and strategic partnerships. Recent updates include monthly income distributions for several ETFs, the surpassing of $250 million in ETF platform assets, the liquidation of a global equity ETF, and Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results.

feed.title: RBC Capital Cuts PT on General Mills (GIS) to $55 From $60 – Here’s Why
feed.summary: RBC Capital has lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) to $55 from $60, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The adjustment follows a mixed Q3 performance impacted by weather, though the company reaffirmed its fiscal year 2026 guidance as Q4 is expected to see a reversal of these dynamics. Separately, TD Cowen also cut its price target to $37 from $45 and reiterated a Hold rating, citing a Q3 EPS miss and anticipated margin pressure for fiscal year 2027 despite inventory headwinds expected to reverse in Q4.

feed.title: UBS Cuts PT on The Campbell’s Company (CPB) to $20 From $24 – Here’s Why
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target on The Campbell’s Company (CPB) to $20 from $24, maintaining a Sell rating, following the company's fiscal Q2 2026 financial results. Campbell's reported a 5% decrease in net sales and a 31% drop in adjusted EPS, partly attributed to January storm-related shipment delays. The company, known for brands like Campbell's and Goldfish, highlighted these factors impacted its financial performance.

feed.title: FIS leans into big bank strategy
feed.summary: FIS is re-emphasizing its strategy of focusing on large bank clients, particularly those with over $10 billion in assets, after a period where it diversified into smaller clients and merchant services. CEO Stephanie Ferris and CFO James Kehoe affirmed this renewed focus, highlighting cross-selling opportunities and the growing importance of their payments business following recent acquisitions. The company also sees artificial intelligence as a significant accelerant for its services, especially for mid-sized financial institutions looking to enhance back-office efficiency.

feed.title: Fox Corp. (Class B) stock faces uncertainty amid shifting media landscape and regulatory pressures i
feed.summary: Fox Corp. (Class B) stock (NASDAQ: FOX) is navigating a complex media landscape in 2026, marked by declining linear TV viewership and intense streaming competition. Key factors influencing its performance include heated affiliate fee negotiations, the growth of its ad-supported streaming service Tubi, and the cyclical boost from political advertising ahead of midterm elections. US investors are drawn to the stock for its dividend stability and valuation, despite risks from regulatory scrutiny and cord-cutting trends.

feed.title: Keysight targets car network reliability with new Ethernet test tools
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE: KEYS) is showcasing new automotive Ethernet receiver compliance test solutions at the Automotive Ethernet Congress in Germany. These solutions are designed to ensure the reliability and safety of next-generation in-vehicle networks, supporting validation from 10BASE-T1S to 10GBASE-T1. The company introduced a 10BASE-T1S Receiver Test Solution and an nGBASE-AU Optical Automotive Ethernet test solution, both critical for the transition to software-defined vehicles and high-speed zonal architectures.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Co stock rises on Baupost Group stake increase amid tech chief exit and valuation disc
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co (GPC) stock advanced on the NYSE after Baupost Group increased its stake in Q4 2025, signaling confidence despite a tough Q4 and the upcoming departure of its tech chief. The stock is trading at a discount of about 26% below analyst targets. US investors are eyeing GPC for its dominant position in the auto aftermarket and potential for long-term value despite digital transformation challenges and sector headwinds.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adds Levi Strauss & Co. (LEVI) to its Top Picks List – Here’s Why
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has added Levi Strauss & Co. (LEVI) to its Top Picks list, reaffirming an Overweight rating and raising numbers, anticipating a shift in sentiment due to improved margin visibility in late 2026 and 2027. This positive outlook follows Levi Strauss & Co.'s successful sale of the Dockers® brand, which is expected to sharpen the company's focus on its core Levi's® and Beyond Yoga® brands, thereby bolstering profitability and simplifying its portfolio.

feed.title: How Top U.S. Acquirers Ranking Changed Following Acquisitions
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. has overtaken JPMorgan Chase & Co. as the top U.S. merchant acquirer, largely due to its acquisition of Worldpay. The 2026 TSG Directory of U.S. Merchant Acquirers shows Global Payments with an estimated $2.8 trillion in 2025 processing volume. The top 10 acquirers processed nearly $11 trillion in transactions in 2025, driven by diversification into channels like integrated software vendors, a segment that benefits providers like Stripe and Toast.

feed.title: TeraWulf Inc. (WULF) Gets Initiated With a Buy Rating by Arete – Here’s Why
feed.summary: TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ: WULF) has been initiated with a Buy rating by Arete, setting a price target of $30, largely due to its energy background and potential for site expansion. The firm views WULF's shares as attractively valued, despite the company's plan to shut down Bitcoin mining operations by late 2026. In fiscal year 2025, TeraWulf reported strong financial results with $168.5 million in revenue and $23.1 million in non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA, benefiting from long-term data center lease agreements.

feed.title: Caterpillar Countersues Bobcat Alleging Patent Infringement
feed.summary: Caterpillar has filed a counterclaim against Doosan Bobcat, alleging infringement on six of its patents. This action comes after Doosan Bobcat sued Caterpillar in December for patent infringement. Both companies claim a history of innovation in construction equipment and are seeking monetary damages, compensation, and legal costs, with the cases expected to take years to resolve.

feed.title: Calvert Cliffs Refueling Outage Delivers Close to $90 Million in Upgrades and Provides Powerful Boost to the Local Economy
feed.summary: The Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Center recently completed its annual spring refueling outage, investing nearly $90 million in upgrades and bringing significant economic benefit to Calvert County. The outage, which focused on multi-million-dollar equipment upgrades, brought over 1,500 skilled workers to the area, boosting local businesses like hotels and restaurants. Calvert Cliffs, Maryland's only nuclear energy facility, reliably powers 1.3 million homes with emissions-free energy and contributes substantially to the state's economy.

feed.title: Jabil Circuit stock hits all-time high at 281.66 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jabil Circuit's stock has reached an all-time high of $281.66, reflecting a 95.45% increase over the past year and a market capitalization of $29.6 billion. This surge follows strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results, with revenue up 23% to $8.3 billion and raised full-year guidance. Analysts have increased price targets, and the company is aggressively buying back shares.

feed.title: Wesco Recognized on Fortune's 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies List
feed.summary: Wesco International (NYSE:WCC) has been named to Fortune's 2026 America's Most Innovative Companies list, acknowledging its commitment to innovation in products, processes, and workplace culture. The company is recognized for its disciplined approach to delivering customer value through digital capabilities, supply chain solutions, and operational excellence. CEO John Engel emphasized that this recognition reflects their focus on improving customer service, strengthening operations, and positioning Wesco for long-term growth.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger Inc stock faces choppy trading amid analyst upgrades and undervaluation narrative as Q1 earnings loom
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger Inc (NYSE: GWW) is experiencing choppy trading, with shares around $1,054, despite institutional buying and a raised price target from Morgan Stanley to $1,190. The stock is considered 8.3% undervalued ahead of Q1 2026 earnings, benefiting from its strong position in the resilient maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) distribution sector. Investors are weighing the current dip as a potential entry point against its premium P/E ratio, while analysts remain optimistic about its long-term performance driven by scale and supply chain advantages.

feed.title: Bristow Group Inc stock faces insider selling pressure amid recent director transaction and valuatio
feed.summary: Bristow Group Inc. is experiencing insider selling pressure following a director's sale of 1,000 shares for $45,000. This comes as the stock has gained 42% annually, yet analysts are divided on its valuation, with some suggesting undervaluation and others slight overvaluation. The company operates in offshore energy transport and public safety, with strong operational metrics, but investors are watching insider activity and potential geopolitical risks closely.

feed.title: Why Raymond James Sees Marathon Petroleum Reaching $270
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for Marathon Petroleum (MPC) to $270, citing sustained high refining margins due to Middle East supply disruptions and robust distributions from its midstream subsidiary, MPLX. The target reflects an "Outperform" rating, anticipating that geopolitical tensions will keep refining margins above historical averages through mid-2026. Key drivers include current high WTI crude prices, solid Q4 2025 EBITDA growth, and substantial shareholder return programs through buybacks and dividends, contingent on geopolitical stability and successful project execution.

feed.title: Yelp Inc stock faces uncertainty amid slowing local search growth and rising AI competition pressure
feed.summary: Yelp Inc is confronting challenges due to decelerating revenue growth in its local business listings and increased competition from AI-driven search alternatives. The company's core business of connecting consumers with local services is experiencing tapering growth in users and advertisers, and AI integrations by tech giants like Google and Apple pose a direct threat. Yelp is responding by enhancing its own AI features and expanding into enterprise solutions and partnerships to diversify its offerings.

feed.title: WVE: Mizuho Maintains Outperform, Raises Price Target to $27 | WVE
feed.summary: Mizuho has reiterated its "Outperform" rating for Wave Life Sciences (WVE) and increased its price target from $22.00 to $27.00, signaling continued confidence in the stock's growth potential. This adjustment follows several other analyst upgrades for WVE in early 2026. The average one-year price target from 16 analysts for WVE is $35.13, suggesting a significant upside from its current price, although GuruFocus estimates a lower GF Value.

feed.title: Assessing VinFast Auto (NasdaqGS:VFS) Valuation After Analyst Meetings Highlight Long Term EV Ecosystem Push
feed.summary: VinFast Auto (NasdaqGS:VFS) is gaining renewed attention following recent analyst meetings that underscored its commitment to long-term expansion, particularly in building out its EV charging and ride-hailing ecosystem. Despite strong delivery figures, the stock has seen a decline in recent months, raising questions about whether it is an undervalued long-term player or if future growth is already priced in. The predominant narrative suggests VinFast is undervalued at $6.38 compared to its current price of $2.98, driven by aggressive delivery targets and the strategic rollout of charging infrastructure and partnerships.

feed.title: Raymond James Sets $205 Target on PSX as Refining Margins Nearly Double
feed.summary: Raymond James has raised its price target for Phillips 66 (PSX) to $205, maintaining an Outperform rating, due to significantly increased refining margins and geopolitical tailwinds. The company's shares have seen a substantial year-to-date surge, driven by nearly doubled worldwide refining margins in Q4 2025 and strategic acquisitions like WRB Refining. For PSX to reach this target, sustained elevated refining margins, continued execution on cost reduction, and a strong Q1 2026 earnings report are crucial.

feed.title: Starbucks Stock Climbs Modestly on China Progress and U.S. Turnaround Hopes
feed.summary: Starbucks stock showed modest gains as investors balanced ongoing U.S. traffic challenges with signs of stabilization in China and the company's multi-year reset plan. The company recently sold a 60% stake in its Chinese retail operations for approximately $4 billion, aiming to reinvest in the U.S. market. CEO Brian Niccol's 2026 reset focuses on global growth, innovation, and enhancing the in-store experience, with analysts cautiously optimistic about future recovery.

feed.title: YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2728
feed.summary: The YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA: BITO) has declared a weekly distribution of $0.2728 per share. This distribution is payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 28, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of March 27, 2026. This announcement highlights the ETF's strategy to generate income for its investors.

feed.title: MGM launches a $330 all-inclusive-style Las Vegas vacation package
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has introduced a new all-inclusive-style vacation package in Las Vegas, starting at $330 plus taxes. This package, offered at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino, includes a two-night stay for two, three daily meals, two show tickets, a ride on The Big Apple Coaster, and self-parking, aiming to make Las Vegas more affordable. While it doesn't include unlimited alcohol, it provides significant value by bundling accommodations, dining, and entertainment, contrasting with the often high costs of individual services in the city.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Freshpet (NASDAQ:FRPT) Price Target to $66.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for Freshpet (NASDAQ:FRPT) from $80.00 to $66.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the company beating its quarterly EPS estimates and posting strong revenue growth. Other analysts have a mixed view, with an average target price of $76.00. Freshpet's stock price currently trades below many analyst targets, with a market capitalization near $2.85 billion.

feed.title: WAVE Life Sciences (NASDAQ:WVE) Price Target Raised to $27.00 at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for WAVE Life Sciences (NASDAQ:WVE) to $27.00 from $22.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating and implying a 117% upside. The company trades around $12.42 with a $2.34 billion market cap, recently missed quarterly EPS estimates, and has seen insider selling. Despite these factors, analysts generally have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $33.31.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley reiterates Overweight on Arm stock, $135 target
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reiterated an Overweight rating and a $135 price target for Arm Holdings after the company announced its AGI CPU at the Arm Everywhere event. The new dual-chiplet CPU, fabricated by TSMC on 3nm process technology, is aimed at the x86 rack-scale market in AI cloud for agentic inference, with initial customers including Meta and partners like OpenAI and Cerebras. While Arm stock currently trades above the price target, up 23% year-to-date, Arm expects initial sales to ramp up in fiscal year 2028, targeting a total addressable market exceeding $100 billion by 2030.

feed.title: Wellchange Holdings Company Limited Announces Strategic Development of Next-Generation AI Bookkeeping and Bank Statement Intelligence Platform
feed.summary: Wellchange Holdings Company Limited (WCT) announced the strategic development of a new AI-powered bookkeeping and bank statement intelligence platform. This platform aims to enhance financial data management for businesses, accountants, and auditors by integrating automated AI bookkeeping with intelligent bank statement reconciliation. The solution is currently in testing and is scheduled for commercial launch in Q2 2026, building on WCT's existing AI accounting ecosystem.

feed.title: UBS lowers Incyte stock price target on revenue concerns to $94
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Incyte Corp. (NASDAQ: INCY) to $94 from $104, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock, citing concerns that Q1 consensus estimates do not fully account for seasonality in the company's Opzelura and Jakafi products. This adjustment anticipates a topline revenue miss, despite Incyte's strong revenue growth over the last twelve months. The article also notes other recent developments for Incyte, including executive leadership changes and varying analyst ratings from H.C. Wainwright, Barclays, and Jefferies.

feed.title: Altria Group Inc stock advances on nationwide on! PLUS nicotine pouch rollout amid smoke-free strategy push
feed.summary: Altria Group Inc. (NYSE: MO) is expanding its on! PLUS nicotine pouches nationwide, marking a significant step in its smoke-free strategy. The stock saw a rebound amidst this news, which is aimed at offsetting declining cigarette sales. The launch is crucial for Altria's long-term success in the evolving nicotine market, with investors monitoring its impact on earnings and market share.

feed.title: Intel Stock Jumps as Chip Prices and Hopes Rise
feed.summary: Intel's stock (INTC) is rising due to its decision to increase prices across its CPU lineup, driven by supply shortages and higher material costs in the chip market. This move suggests strong demand for their products, which could boost margins and future earnings. The stock is also benefiting from the launch of Intel’s enterprise-focused Core Ultra Series 3 chips, highlighting advancements in its manufacturing technology.

feed.title: Halliburton’s $42 Price Target From BMO Signals More Runway After a Monster 2026
feed.summary: BMO Capital has raised its price target for Halliburton (HAL) to $42, up from $39, implying substantial upside from its current $38.11 despite maintaining a Market Perform rating. This revised target is supported by Halliburton's strong international performance, including $1.5 billion in Middle East Q4 revenue and 7% sequential growth in international revenue, and an anticipated recovery in North America spending. The company's $100 million quarterly restructuring savings and significant free cash flow return to shareholders further bolster its per-share earnings growth.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Corp stock sees fresh institutional interest amid mixed signals from insiders and va
feed.summary: Institutional investors are increasing their stakes in Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS), with SG Americas Securities LLC significantly boosting its holdings, reflecting confidence in the company's long-term prospects tied to Macau's recovery and Singapore expansions. This institutional bullishness contrasts with recent share sales by CEO Patrick Dumont and conflicting valuation models, as the stock appears overvalued by some DCF analyses but fair by P/E metrics. Despite the mixed signals, LVS's strong Q4 earnings and strategic expansions affirm its position as a key play for US investors seeking exposure to global leisure spending.

feed.title: US Defense Department Signs $500 Million Contract With Honeywell
feed.summary: Honeywell has secured a $500 million contract with the U.S. Department of Defense to upgrade its production capacity, signaling a significant investment in defense technologies the company provides. This comes as Honeywell also progresses with its planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which is expected to become an independent, publicly traded entity listed on Nasdaq under the ticker HONA by Q3 2026. Despite some short-term stock weakness, the company shows longer-term strength and maintains a "Buy" rating from analysts.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Introduces All-Inclusive Las Vegas Strip Package Combining Hotel, Dining, Entertainment and Parking
feed.summary: MGM Resorts has launched a new all-inclusive package for Las Vegas, starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay at Luxor or Excalibur. This package bundles hotel, dining, entertainment, and parking, aiming to simplify trip planning and offer more value to travelers. Stays begin April 6, featuring dynamic pricing and no blackout dates, making a convenient way to experience MGM's offerings.

feed.title: VF Corp stock gains momentum amid outdoor sector buzz and Q3 earnings beat as trading volume surges
feed.summary: VF Corp (VFC) shares rose 2.18% on the NYSE to $17.31 following strong Q3 2026 earnings, with EPS beating estimates by 28.89% and revenue up 4.73% to $2.88 billion. The company, known for brands like Vans and The North Face, is seen as a value play in consumer cyclicals despite risks from $5.75 billion in debt. Increased trading volume and analyst optimism suggest potential for recovery and margin expansion, targeting 10% by 2028.

feed.title: Did VICI’s US$1.50 Billion One Beverly Hills Mezz Loan Just Shift VICI Properties' (VICI) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. provided a US$1.50 billion mezzanine loan for the One Beverly Hills luxury development, deepening its relationship with Cain and Eldridge Industries and marking a significant push into experiential real estate. This move highlights VICI's increasing exposure to development and mezzanine lending risks, alongside its core strategy of long-term triple net leases. While this financing solidifies VICI's position in high-profile projects, investors are advised to monitor the execution risk associated with these complex ventures.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Unveils New Counter-UAS Autonomous Vehicle
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) has introduced the Leonidas Autonomous Ground Vehicle, a mobile counter-UAS solution developed in collaboration with Epirus and Kodiak AI. This autonomous vehicle is designed to protect critical infrastructure from drone threats using high-power microwave technology and AI-powered driving. The company demonstrates strong financial health with robust revenue and operating margins, despite some warning signs of declining gross margins, and maintains a solid market position within the Aerospace & Defense industry.

feed.title: Faith-based investor coalition sues UnitedHealth to force disclosure of M&A impacts
feed.summary: A coalition of faith-based investors is suing UnitedHealth Group to compel the company to disclose the impacts of its vertical integration strategy and significant mergers and acquisitions on U.S. patients and the healthcare system. The lawsuit follows UnitedHealth's refusal to include a shareholder proposal for such a report in its annual meeting proxy materials, a decision the SEC allowed to stand due to staff limitations. The investors argue that the proposal addresses a significant policy issue regarding competition and patient care, despite UnitedHealth's claims that it relates to ordinary business operations.

feed.title: Cintas (CTAS) Exceeds Revenue Expectations with Strong Q3 Performance
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation (CTAS) reported strong third-quarter results, with revenue of $2.84 billion, surpassing analyst expectations. The company achieved 8.2% organic growth and record gross margins, attributed to strategic investments and operational efficiency. Cintas's robust financial health is further supported by a strong balance sheet and a high Piotroski F-Score, indicating stability and potential for continued growth despite market volatility.

feed.title: Crown Castle stock hits 52-week low at $77.01 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Crown Castle International Corp's stock has hit a 52-week low at $77.01, representing an 18% decrease over the past year. Despite this decline and ongoing market volatility, the company offers a 5.4% dividend yield and has maintained dividend payments for 13 consecutive years. Analysts have mixed views on its future performance, with some downgrading due to growth concerns and others initiating Outperform ratings based on potential revenue growth and current valuations.

feed.title: Viomi Technology Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Viomi Technology (NASDAQ: VIOT) reported mixed financial results for 2025, with second-half net revenue decreasing by 25.9% but full-year revenue increasing by 14.6%. The company is actively pursuing a "Global Water" strategy, focusing on overseas expansion in North America and Southeast Asia, driven by AI-powered product development and increased R&D investments. Viomi also announced shareholder returns through special dividends and a $20 million share buyback program.

feed.title: McDonald's Stock Edges Higher on Value Menu Momentum Amid Consumer Caution
feed.summary: McDonald's stock saw a modest increase as investors reacted positively to the company's new value menu offerings, designed to attract budget-conscious consumers facing high inflation. Despite recent pullbacks from its 52-week high, analysts maintain a bullish outlook, citing McDonald's strong brand, franchised model, and adaptability. The company's focus on digital innovation, global expansion, and consistent dividends reinforces its position as a defensive growth stock.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group stock faces headwinds from rising rates and regulatory scrutiny in Midwest utility
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) is facing pressures from rising interest costs, regulatory scrutiny, and delays in clean energy projects despite beating Q4 2025 EPS expectations. The company's $37 billion five-year capital expenditure plan focuses on grid modernization and renewables but faces execution risks from permitting delays and supply chain issues. While offering a defensive yield and consistent dividend hikes, investors are cautious due to increased financing costs and potential regulatory challenges in its Midwest service areas.

feed.title: Pharma M&A Roundup: Merck to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Shionogi to Acquire 50% of Apnimed’s Ownership of Shionogi-Apnimed Sleep Science
feed.summary: Merck is set to acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals for $6.7 billion to enhance its oncology pipeline, specifically for the investigational drug TERN-701 targeting chronic myeloid leukemia. Separately, Shionogi will acquire Apnimed's 50% stake in their joint venture, Shionogi-Apnimed Sleep Science, for $150 million upfront plus royalties, allowing Apnimed to focus on its lead obstructive sleep apnea candidate, AD109. These transactions highlight continued M&A activity in the pharmaceutical industry to optimize portfolios.

feed.title: Varonis Systems (VRNS) Fell as It Missed Quarterly Projections
feed.summary: Varonis Systems (VRNS) stock fell after the company missed its fourth-quarter 2025 financial projections. The miss was largely due to the company discontinuing its on-premises solution to focus on its SaaS platform, which led to lower renewals and extreme stock volatility. Loomis Sayles Small Cap Growth Fund exited its position in VRNS due to these issues, despite the company reporting a 9% increase in revenue from Q4 2024.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Corp stock faces short-term pressure amid falling trend and mixed technical signals
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark Corp (KMB) stock experienced a decline of 0.533% on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, closing at $98.92 on the NYSE, extending a short-term downtrend. Technical indicators and moving averages are issuing sell signals, with analysts projecting a further 6.16% drop over the next three months. Despite its defensive qualities as a consumer staples company, KMB faces heightened volatility and downside risk, challenging dividend-focused investors.

feed.title: Gladstone Institutes expands research footprint with 105,000 square feet of new laboratory space
feed.summary: Gladstone Institutes is significantly expanding its research capacity by securing over 105,000 square feet of new laboratory space at 1450 Owens Street in San Francisco's Mission Bay district. This expansion, part of their $350 million Gladstone NOW capital campaign, will house approximately 300 scientists across 20 new labs starting in early 2027, focusing on AI-driven biomedicine, data science, and genomic immunology. The move aims to accelerate the development of new therapies and cures for various diseases, leveraging advanced technology and computational power.

feed.title: Viavi Solutions to present next generation hollow core fibre for data centres
feed.summary: Viavi Solutions is highlighting the urgent need for faster, lower-latency, and more resilient data center interconnects to support the growth of AI and hybrid cloud. The company, in partnership with Cabling Installation & Maintenance, will host an event on April 1 to discuss next-generation fiber technologies, including hollow core fiber, addressing the escalating demands on data center infrastructure. This initiative follows previous engagements on security validation and AI-driven optical technologies.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches PPD CorEvitas Alzheimer’s Registry
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched the PPD CorEvitas Alzheimer’s Disease Registry, an international and multi-country initiative aimed at generating real-world data to evaluate drug safety and effectiveness. The registry, which has already enrolled its first patient, will provide a comprehensive understanding of Alzheimer's therapy outcomes, long-term safety, and treatment patterns from routine clinical practice. This effort will help inform regulators, clinicians, patients, and caregivers by identifying unmet medical needs and assessing the impact of the disease and existing treatments.
